title: US embassy in UAE issues security alert: Americans urged to consider leaving as consular services shut
summary_full: The U.S. Embassy in Abu Dhabi and Consulate General in Dubai issued an urgent security alert for American citizens in the UAE due to escalating regional tensions and potential security risks. Non-emergency government employees and families were ordered to leave the country as a precaution amid ongoing conflict and drone activity.
